senses.definition: blown or stunned by a sudden gust or metaphorically overwhelmed before a scene; extremely tired or impressed

senses.definition: to become covered with foam or froth

senses.definition: to cause to become unclear or confused; to make foggy
examples: The dense mist befogs the road.

senses.definition: a nonstandard or abbreviated form with no widely recognized meaning; possibly a typographical error or nonce term
